stakeholders.Role: Conducts dietary data collection and nutrition surveillance

Source metadata.extraction_context: 2001 to 2018. NHANES is a cross-sectional, nationally representative survey designed to assess the health and nutritional status of the US population. The survey uses a complex, stratified, multistage probability cluster sampling design to obtain a nationally representative sample of 5000 noninstitutionalized civilian US residents annually...

stakeholders.Role: Co-author discussing the dietary impacts of ultra-processed foods

Source metadata.extraction_context: The dietary and health impacts of ultra-processed foods can be understood across the nutri-biochemical, food and dietary pattern levels.
